title: MGN 425 (M+F) Amendment 3 risks for those sleeping on "dead ships"
body: "This notice should be read in conjunction with the Merchant Shipping (Work in Fishing Convention Regulations 2018 (ILO 188) MGN 587 (M+F) Amendment 1 ILO Work in Fishing Convention, Health and Safety responsibilities, MGN 413 (F) Amendment 2 Voluntary Code of Practice for Employment of Non-European Economic Area (EEA) Fishing Crew, MGN 636 Amendment 3 Merchant Shipping and Fishing Vessels (Health and Safety at Work) Regulations 1997, MGN 312 (F) Liquid petroleum gas and diesel fuelled appliances,  and the Code of Practice for the Safety Fishing Vessels of Less than 15m Length Overall sections 5.4 and 6.8.  Notice to all Shipowners, Masters, Skippers, Fishermen and Crew.  This notice replaces MGN 425 (M+F) Amendment 2. "
